jobs.title: Performance Engineer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Performance Engineer</strong></p><p>BigID is the data-discovery + data-classification + data-privacy / governance platform pioneered around AI-driven-data-intelligence-as-a-service & the DSPM segment.</p>

jobs.content: <p>Lead BigID's outbound prospecting across the Discovery / Privacy / Security / Governance / Cloud DSPM platform.</p>
